dialogue_text: Oh, your Majesty, we thought you would be killed! How did you manage to escape the great Wildcat?
source_excerpt: "Oh, your Majesty, we thought you would be killed! How did you manage to escape the great Wildcat?" They all bowed so low to the little Queen that they almost stood upon their heads.
